subject: Never miss a lead at Belle Properties
body:
Hi,

I came across Belle Properties in Charlotte and noticed you handle both buying and selling. In real estate, speed to lead is everything, and most agents lose deals because they don't follow up fast enough.

We help real estate agencies set up automated lead capture and follow-up sequences. When someone submits an inquiry, they get an instant personalized response and your agents get notified immediately with all the details.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
